mapper.sql: fu.user_id, fu.user_name, fu.last_update_date, fu.last_updated_by, fu.creation_date, fu.created_by, fu.last_update_login, fu.encrypted_foundation_password, fu.encrypted_user_password, fu.session_number, fu.start_date, fu.end_date, fu.description, fu.last_logon_date, fu.password_date, fu.password_accesses_left, fu.password_lifespan_accesses, fu.password_lifespan_days, fu.employee_id, fu.email_address, fu.fax, fu.customer_id, fu.supplier_id, fu.web_password, fu.user_guid, fu.gcn_code_combination_id, fu.person_party_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM fnd_user fu WHERE fu.user_name LIKE UPPER(#{userName})

SELECT * FROM (SELECT t.*, ROWNUM rownum_ FROM (SELECT
FROM fnd_user fu WHERE fu.user_name LIKE UPPER(#{userName}) ORDER BY ${sort} ${order}) t) WHERE rownum_ > #{startRow} AND rownum_ <= #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT (1) FROM fnd_user WHERE user_name LIKE UPPER(#{userName} )
